code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      tokens = list.push(tokens, parsed)
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(current)
  let parsed = match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  tokens = list.push(tokens, parsed)
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
let tlen = tokens.len()
mut j = 0
while j < tlen
  let v = match tokens.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if not has_prev
    result = list.push(result, v)
    prev = v
    has_prev = true
  else if v != prev
    result = list.push(result, v)
    prev = v
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
let rlen = result.len()
mut k = 0
while k < rlen
  let v = match result.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
